headline: The Insider Report: Geopolitical Tensions Boil Over as Stocks Near Inflection Point
'Iranian State Media Reports Mojtaba Khamenei, The Second Son Of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Has Been Named As Iran's New Leader' - Al Jazeera
Chris Wright Dismisses Strait Of Hormuz Fears As Oil Prices Surge
summary: On Sunday, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said worries about a shutdown at the Strait of Hormuz are overblown, arguing shipments are still moving and that the jump in prices is being driven by anxiety rather than missing supply.

headline: Iran's Assembly of Experts Confirms New Supreme Leader Selection, Name Still Secret
summary: As the Assembly of Experts in Iran moves towards confirming a new supreme leader, President Donald Trump has expressed a desire to be "personally involved" in the selection process, labeling Mojtaba Khamenei as "a lightweight" and drawing parallels to his approach in Venezuela.

headline: Teen Turns His Old Nikes Into A $400,000 Hustle: Here's How He Did It
summary: Teen turns hobby into successful sneaker business, earning $400k in sales. Started by selling 5 pairs online, now has 2 storefronts and plans for expansion.

headline: Trump Threatens To Sit on All Other Legislation Until SAVE Act Passes
summary: President Trump called for the SAVE America Act voting legislation to take priority over every other item on Capitol Hill, saying he would withhold his signature from other legislation until it is enacted

headline: Single Clients Are The Next Big Opportunity
summary: Financial planning assumes most people will eventually pair up, but with Americans marrying later or not at all, there is a growing segment of financially independent clients that advisors should consider. Singles prioritize near-term goals and may need guidance from advisors as they make financial decisions alone.

headline: Brian Armstrong Hunted For Fixes When His Crypto Company Went Flat Post-Launch: He Found Them By Simply Picking Up The Phone
summary: Coinbase Global Inc.  faced setbacks in its early days, so Brian Armstrong did what any startup founder would do— talk to customers to improve the product.

headline: California Gas Prices Surge, Ross Gerber Says It's 'Time To Buy an EV'
summary: On Saturday, Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management CEO Ross Gerber warned that California's spike in gasoline costs hits drivers unevenly, arguing the pain is avoidable for people who switch to an electric vehicle and pointing shoppers toward Rivian and Kia as alternatives to Tesla.

headline: The Trade Desk, Circle, And Venture Global Are Among the Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (March 2-March 6): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: These large-cap gainers climbed last week on upbeat earnings, stronger guidance, analyst support, deal and buyback news, and sector-specific momentum in energy, ad tech and software.

headline: Celsius, Carnival Corp., MongoDB Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Losers Last Week (March 2-March 6): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: These large-cap laggards sank last week as investors reacted to earnings misses, weak outlooks, takeover pressure, higher yields, and rising geopolitical and AI-demand fears.

headline: Consumer Tech News (March 2-6): Major Chip Earnings, Trump Refuted Negotiations With Anthropic AI & More
summary: Major market headlines include AI regulation debates, Nvidia chip export uncertainty, Broadcom earnings, and strategic moves by Netflix, Meta, Amazon, and CrowdStrike across technology sectors.

headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: The Benzinga Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks seeing strong interest from readers during the week and a look at the catalysts driving the attention.

headline: Crypto Weekend Round-Up: Binance's Iran-Linked Crypto Controversy, Kazakhstan's Crypto Investment And More
summary: This week in crypto saw Binance deny allegations of Iran-linked crypto flows, National Bank of Kazakhstan announce a $350 million investment in crypto infrastructure, Andreessen Horowitz seek $2 billion for a new blockchain fund, major banks including Morgan Stanley and Citigroup move toward Bitcoin integration, while Bitcoin slid to around $68,000 amid market uncertainty.

headline: Weekend Round-Up: Anthropic, Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Alibaba And Adobe Make Headlines
summary: This week in tech saw Netflix drop its pursuit of Warner to focus on organic growth, Amazon, Google and Microsoft continue supporting Anthropic despite Pentagon restrictions, Alibaba showcase its AI handling 200 million orders while hiring a former DeepMind scientist, and investor Michael Burry urge Adobe to acquire Midjourney to stay competitive in AI-driven creative tools.

headline: Weekend Round-Up: Xiaomi's Humanoid Robots, BYD's Canada Move, Geely's Sales Lead, Tesla's Europe Registrations And More
summary: The week in autos saw Xiaomi deploy humanoid robots in EV manufacturing, BYD move toward entering the Canadian market, Geely outsell BYD for a second straight month, Tesla post higher European registrations despite weaker sales, while rising oil prices amid the U.S.–Iran conflict pressured shares of Ford Motor Company, General Motors and Stellantis.

headline: Apple's Ai-Powered Products, Google's Cybersecurity Threat And More: This Week In Appleverse
summary: Weekend tech and finance roundup: Apple unveils AI-powered Macs and MacBook Neo, Apple TV joins Roku, and Google flags a major iOS cybersecurity threat.

headline: Trump's Trade Wars, AI Displacement, Bitcoin's Future And More: This Week In Economy
summary: It’s been an eventful week in the world of business and finance. Here’s a quick look at the top stories that made headlines.

headline: Explosion Hits US Embassy In Oslo, Causes Minor Damage And Thick Smoke, No Injuries Reported
summary: Explosion at U.S. embassy in Oslo causes minor damage and smoke, but no injuries. Police investigate for perpetrators.

headline: Elizabeth Warren 'Worried' After Iran Briefing, Trump Rejects UK Carrier Offer And More: This Week In Politics
summary: Weekend roundup: Warren worries after Iran briefing, Trump blames Iran for school bombing, rejects U.K. carrier offer, Blinken flags drone costs, and White House reshuffles continue.

headline: Ray Dalio Says People Make Bad Decisions Because They Are 'Certain That They're Right,' Urges Leaders To Embrace Uncertainty
summary: Ray Dalio stresses the importance of embracing uncertainty and seeking diverse perspectives for smarter decisions in business and life.

headline: What Price Will Crude Oil Reach By End Of March? Here's What Prediction Market Is Saying
summary: Crude oil has been in focus since the U.S. and Israel began their strikes on Iran, which also killed the Islamic Republic's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

headline: Trump Eyes Ground Raid As Intel Confirms Iran Can Access Buried Uranium Stockpile At Isfahan: Report
summary: U.S. intelligence warn that Iran can still access its uranium stockpile at Isfahan despite earlier strikes.

headline: Chamath Palihapitiya Says AI Costs At Startup 8090 Could Hit $10 Million A Year: 'Our Costs Have More Than Tripled'
summary: AI costs surge for startup 8090 as Chamath Palihapitiya warns of inefficient usage and expensive tools like Cursor.

headline: Trump Rejects UK Offer To Deploy Aircraft Carriers To Middle East: 'We Don't Need Them Any Longer,' Says 'We've Already Won'
summary: President Trump rejected the U.K.'s offer to deploy aircraft carriers to the Middle East amid the ongoing U.S.-Iran conflict.

headline: Trump Says He's Seen 'No Indication' Russia Is Sharing Intelligence With Iran
summary: Trump denies Russia-Iran intelligence sharing despite claims. Officials warn of escalating tensions and impact on global energy markets.

headline: Saudi Arabia Warns Iran Energy Attacks Could Open Riyadh's Bases To US Forces: Report
summary: Saudi Arabia warned Iran that continued attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure could prompt U.S. military access to its bases.

headline: Trump Administration Refutes Claims Of US Soldiers Captured By Iran Amid Intensifying Conflict: Report
summary: Trump admin denies Iran's claims of capturing US soldiers. US dismisses accusations as false and maintains optimism about progress in the war.

headline: Bernie Sanders Slams 'Billions For An Illegal & Unconstitutional War' As Democrats Criticize Military Spending Over Health Care, Housing
summary: Lawmakers criticize Iran war funding, calling for funds to be used for healthcare, housing, and family costs.

headline: Jeff Bezos' Amazon Urges FCC To Prevent Elon Musk's SpaceX Proposal To Launch A Million Satellites
summary: Amazon objects to SpaceX's plan to launch a million satellites, citing feasibility concerns and potential for orbital congestion.

headline: Trump Says Iran Responsible For Deadly School Bombing, Hegseth Says US Is 'Investigating'
summary: President Trump blamed Iran for a deadly bombing at an Iranian girls' school, contradicting U.S. reports and fueling international concern.

headline: Global Oil Supply Crippled As Gulf Attacks, Hormuz Blockade Send Prices Surging
summary: Crude oil prices surged 35% amid attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure and the near shutdown of tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Iranian Foreign Minister Says Trump 'Killed' President Pezeshkian's De-Escalation Push
summary: Iran warns US against escalation, blames Trump for ending chance at de-escalation. Warns of military response.
